fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shri Balwant Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Shri Balwant Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in offline mode. reviews.review_heading: Best college for industry integrated B.Tech .
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 20 acres of land. Its calm and serene nature makes it ideal for studying. Big library, Wi-Fi campus and air-conditioned classrooms are there. All labs are available for all practical training and the workshop for mechanical students is also quite large.

reviews.review_heading: Best College: provides industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The campus is 20 acres of lush green and very neat, clean, and ventilated. We have two blocks that have different labs in each block, and the library is connected to each block and very big, loaded with essentials and the latest books, research papers, and journals. Wi-Fi campus and proper air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best college for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Labs are decent and well-equipped. Campus is very big and library is equipped with the latest journals and new edition books. The canteen of the campus is air conditioned and mess serves hygienic food. Campus is Wi-Fi enabled and campus is quite big and ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment - Best for B.Teach .
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is equipped with good air conditioning, lighting and ventilation. Labs are well-equipped and it has a big and vast library. The campus has sports facilities like volleyball, basketball, billiards room, gym etc. The food in the canteen and mess is quite good .

reviews.review_heading: Best College under IP University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is good, and it's a 20-acre campus, so quite big. Classrooms are air-conditioned, labs are decent, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is quite big and loaded with all kinds of books. The canteen is okay; the college can add more variety for snacks and beverages.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied because of the academics .
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities required for the course are made available in the campus. Labs are good along with the Wi-Fi being decent but if you are game freak, forget gaming in both the hostel and the campus as it is blocked by a firewall. The best part is the library, it is big and has every kind of book available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but you need to work hard .
reviews.review_text: The campus and hostel are well-equipped with all facilities and necessities. The campus is Wi-Fi, and the labs are decent. Almost all sports facilities are available and provide you with good opportunities to showcase your skill and talent as campus keeps on organizing events.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a nice crowd and also placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is spread over 20 acres of lush green land. The library is an integral part of the institution, and there is a collection of more than 3,500 reference books. The hostel has huge, airy, spacious, well designed and lighted rooms for boys. But the food served in it is not great.

reviews.review_heading: Our college makes students' career, and it also provides ample opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the campus is lush green. Wi-Fi and air-conditioners are available in labs, but there are no air-conditioners and Wi-Fi in classrooms. Hostel food is average. Most of the students prefer to live in hostels, but they try to eat food from outside as the food is not good all the time. Hostel rooms are huge, and only 2 students can stay in each room. Sports ground for cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc., are available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best college to attend in sonepat.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough. We are provided with the free Wi-Fi in the college campus. The classrooms are well furnished and equipped with AC's. The quality of food available in the canteen is average. The hostel rooms have every facilities that student need. No I did not face any infrastructure related issues in the tenure which I spent in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, facilities, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs were fully-equipped with state-of-the-art technology. Classrooms were well-ventilated and air-conditioned. We had sports facilities available, like cricket, basketball, table tennis, and snooker. Apart from this, we also had a gym facility as well, with very good quality equipment. Food served in the canteen was below average, and hostel rooms were also below average. As I was a day scholar, so I did not face any problem relating to the infrastructure of the co...

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Delhi-NCR region.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are smart classes, and all the lectures are delivered through the projector. The college provides good medical facilities. Teachers are very helpful at the time of the medical emergency. The library has many books, and the students can go there and read books anytime.

reviews_list.review_title: There are best placements for all students waiting for jobs. Faculty is very supportive.

reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi facilities for students. There are digital classrooms equipped with sound system, lights, and projector for teaching. The library is air-conditioned and equipped with more than 1,00,000 books. Moreover, it offers a silent environment. Computer lab facilities are available here. Indoor games and sports ground are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very supportive and helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. Projectors are available in classrooms. Seminar halls are available to conduct presentations. Indoor games facilities are available. Grounds are available for outdoor games. Canteen facilities are also available in Pacific Business School. Water cooler facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pacific Business School.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided for students are good. Air-conditioning facilities are available. Bus facilities and other transportation facilities are available near the college. Digital classrooms are available. A canteen is present on the campus. Indoor sports facilities and also a ground are available. Library and computer lab facilities are available. The library has more than 1 lac books.

reviews.review_heading: An avergae college to get a MBA degree.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of this college is quite good, and it also has a pleasant ambience. The entire campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. We also have a nice collection of books in our library, and the 
 computers are also working in good condition with high-speed internet.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and course curriculum are good, and the infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a good study environment. Sports facilities are available, and other activities are also conducted on the campus. Labs are available for students to increase their knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are a little low.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good as it is a big college. The classrooms are also well maintained. There is a library with good amount of books and there is a computer lab with full speed internet on every computer. Canteen is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with the faculty members and the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and nice. It has good fully furnished classrooms, and the quality of labs is also good. There are no loopholes in the infrastructure. Even the canteen also has a wide range of varieties.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching methodology followed in college is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. There is no Wi-Fi facility in classrooms. Wi-Fi facility is only available in the library, and there is full access to the internet in computer labs. The quality of furniture in classrooms is good. I am not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi facility was available only in the library.
Computer labs were good with high-speed internet, and classrooms were well furnished and decorated. The college has open and huge ground for sports and games. There was a good quality of labs and classrooms. The quality of the food was good at our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides the best placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are 3 buildings which are enough to accommodate all the students, teachers, etc. The infrastructure has all the necessary facilities such as Wi-Fi, computer labs, and libraries which are all properly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college had very good infrastructure, lush green campus, Wi-Fi facility and a huge library. There was a sports room for indoor games and a big sports ground for outdoor games as well, and we had 2 theater-style seminar halls.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with placements in better companies and has better and supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available for all the students. There are digital classrooms and new technology teaching. Our college provides transport facilities for students to nearby places. There is a seminar hall, and our college has a library with a silent atmosphere. There are indoor games and ground for outdoor sports. The canteen facility and hostel facility are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were good. It was a very great college with great things that you expect in MBA colleges.
reviews.review_text: There were 4 big seminar halls for meetings and other activities. Big lecture rooms were available with theater-style. There were big conference rooms for meetings, decision-making, and brainstorming sessions, and there was an auditorium for several interactions with air-conditioners. The amphitheater was available for extracurricular activities and other functions. Many other facilities were available here.
